headline: No reason for investors to change their tune on software yet, says Brent Thill

headline: Software makers' best may not be good enough as AI fears mount
summary: Salesforce will likely report its fastest quarterly revenue growth in three years, but analysts say ‌that may not be enough, as fears that artificial intelligence would decimate ‌software makers have sapped investor confidence in the industry.
